2605.27088.title: LLMs Are Already Good Tutors: Training-Free Prompt Optimization for Pedagogical Math Tutoring
2605.27088.paper_summary: Aligning LLMs for math tutoring typically requires RL-based training with multi-GPU infrastructure. We investigate whether training-free prompt optimization-evolving only the system prompt via API calls-can serve as a practical alternative. We adapt 7 published methods and propose 5 education-specialized methods, evaluating these 12 methods under 5 conditions on 2 OOD benchmark suites. All 12 best-per-method configurations surpass the strongest RL-trained baseline (R_total = 0.633), and our ParetoGrad achieves the best Pareto balance across post-test solve rate, leak control, and helpfulness, rather than dominating any single component. Behavioral analysis with an 82-code educational codebook reveals that training-free methods rely on teaching-knowledge patterns at 2-3x the rate of RL-trained models, with a compensating ~10 percentage-point reduction in intent-level scaffolding. We also find a task-dependent reasoning mode effect consistent across training-free and RL-based paradigms. Our approach enables efficient development of pedagogically aligned LLM tutors with prompts alone and minimal compute.
2605.27088.paper_summary_zh: 對於數學輔導，對大型語言模型（LLMs）的調整通常需要基於強化學習（RL）的訓練和多GPU基礎設施。我們探討了無需訓練的提示優化——僅通過API調用演變系統提示——是否可以作為一種實用的替代方案。我們調整了7種已發表的方法，並提出了5種專門針對教育的方法，在2個OOD基準套件的5個條件下評估這12種方法。所有12種最佳每種方法配置的表現均超過了最強的RL訓練基線（R_total = 0.633），而我們的ParetoGrad在後測解題率、漏控和有用性之間達到了最佳的Pareto平衡，而不是主導任何單一組件。使用82個代碼的教育代碼本進行的行為分析顯示，無需訓練的方法依賴於教學知識模式，其速度是RL訓練模型的2-3倍，並在意圖層次的支架上減少了約10個百分點的補償。我們還發現了一種任務依賴的推理模式效應，這在無需訓練和基於RL的範式中是一致的。我們的方法使得僅通過提示和最小計算便能有效開發教學對齊的LLM輔導工具。
2605.27088.author: Unggi Lee et.al.
2605.27088.authors: Unggi Lee, Minchul Shin, Yeil Jeong, Sookbun Lee, Jeongsu Moon, Kyungtae Joo, Eunjoo Lee, Hoilym Kwon
